name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
♧ | In which Chuuya is cleaning the school yard before leaving for home and hears some sobs coming from behind one of the trees. He just didn't know that the source of those hiccups came from you, the unbeatable top 1 in the school exam rankings. (ANY POV!) (HIGH SCHOOL!AU)

original by @otonboa (if you see someone using this same prompt, isn't their.)

This is my first anypov that I'm trying to do, I don't know if it will be good. **pls, read the description of the scenario at least so there can be a contextualization of why it all happens!!** 

artist: @1110yu_ku_si
creator: otonboa
